overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character riding a large white hippogriff-like creature along a winding dirt path through rocky coastal terrain with ancient stone ruins. The scene features dramatic golden hour lighting with scattered clouds, transitioning from cliffside paths to open coastal vistas and finally into a narrow canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliffside path with ancient carved ruins

agents.ego_description: riding a large white feathered hippogriff along a dirt path at the base of a towering stone cliff

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall with weathered stone texture and carved ancient structures
stone ruins carved into the cliff face with archways and columns
winding dirt path with patches of grass and mud
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character riding a white hippogriff along a narrow dirt path hugging the base of a massive stone cliff. Ancient carved ruins are visible embedded in the cliff face to the left, while grassy terrain slopes down to the right. The golden hour lighting casts long shadows across the path as the mount trots steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with ancient stone columns

events.description: path opens up to reveal expansive ocean vista and distant coastline
passing a tall standalone ancient stone column on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the hippogriff as the terrain opens to a panoramic coastal view with scattered ruins

entered.detail: distant ocean visible beyond the coastal cliffs with blue water meeting the sky
tall cylindrical stone pillar with ornate capital, standing alone beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path emerges from the cliff shadow into a wide-open coastal overlook with full sky visibility. The ocean becomes visible in the distance as the character rides past ancient stone columns and ruins. The lighting becomes brighter and more direct as the camera moves into the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between tall rock walls

events.description: entering a narrow canyon with towering rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: riding through a narrow winding canyon passage flanked by tall rock formations and scattered ruins

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow canyon
tall vertical rock wall with layered stone strata forming the right boundary
tall thin rock spire visible at the end of the canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The character rides into a narrow canyon passage with towering rock walls on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor. The path winds between the canyon walls toward a distant rock spire visible at the far end. Ancient ruins are scattered along the canyon walls as the hippogriff continues its steady pace through the dramatic rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed cliffside path into a bright coastal overlook before narrowing into a deep rock canyon. It begins by following a character riding a white hippogriff along a narrow dirt path hugging the base of a massive stone cliff, where ancient carved ruins are embedded in the rock. As the mount trots forward, the path emerges from the cliff's shadow into a wide-open coastal overlook, shifting the lighting to a brighter, more direct glow as the ocean becomes visible beyond scattered stone columns. The scene then shifts as the character rides into a narrow canyon passage, where towering rock walls create an enclosed corridor. Finally, the camera follows the winding path between these dramatic formations toward a distant rock spire visible at the far end of the canyon.
